basic_details.job_title: IIT Roorkee Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for Project Associate, Project Assistant and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: Research Scientist, Project Associate, Sr. Project Assistant (Technical), Project Assistant (Technical)
basic_details.short_information: The latest Indian Institute of Technology Roorkee (IIT Roorkee) Recruitment 2026 has been announced for Research Scientist posts! Published on 02 June 2026 at the official IIT Roorkee website, this new recruitment drive offers 5 openings for eligible candidates. Applicants within the age range as specified in the notification and possessing qualifications such as Ph.D / M.Tech. in Disaster Mitigation & Management / Earthquake Engineering / Earth Sciences or equivalent, B.Tech in any stream / M.Sc. in Computer Sciences or equivalent, or relevant Diploma are eligible to apply via walk-in on 02 J

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D / M.Tech. in Disaster Mitigation & Management / Earthquake Engineering / Earth Sciences or equivalent, B.Tech in any stream / M.Sc. in Computer Sciences or equivalent, Diploma (3 years duration) or graduate, Diploma (3 years duration) or B.Tech. in Electronics and Communications
qualification.details: Research Scientist: Ph.D / M.Tech. in Disaster Mitigation & Management / Earthquake Engineering / Earth Sciences or equivalent. Desired: Ph.D. with minimum 2 years or M.Tech with 4 years experience in earthquake early warning systems. Working experience on Earthworm platform. PhD candidates preferred. Project Associate: B.Tech in any stream / M.Sc. in Computer Sciences or equivalent. Desired: Working knowledge in network routers, switches and cloud computing. Working knowledge of website development, mobile application development and remote network accessing. Sr. Project Assistant (Technical): Diploma (3 years duration) or graduate. Desired: Minimum of 7 year experience in EEW siren installation and maintenance. Knowledge in report preparation using MS Office suite. Project Assistant (Technical): Diploma (3 years duration) or B.Tech. in Electronics and Communications. Desired: 3 year hands-on experience fabricating electronic devices such as in EEW sensor/siren installation and maintenance. Knowledge in report preparation using MS Office suite.
